REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HNOUSING CLINIC, INC. JURY TRIAL SET FOR MAY-11-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HNOUSING CLINIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEAM, TOBIAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 34 SIXTH STREET #517, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $3,044.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,044.00, LEASE FORFEITED, AN IMMEDIATE WRIT OF POSSESSION FOR THE ABOVE PREMISES WILL ISSUE AND PLAINTIFF WILL DEPOSIT EVICTION FEES WITH THE SHERIFF OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO FOR PREPOSTING OF THE PREMISES; HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF WILL STAY EXECUTION OF THIS WRIT ON THE CONDITION THAT DEFENDANT VACATE THE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 5 PM ON 5-15-09. SECURITY DEPOSIT IS FORFEITED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
